name: The no existence of you and me (Lilith)
description:
The no existence of you and me..

I played this game for 6 hours, i have all the achievements and endings.

My first ending was the bad 😞

So after all that playing i searched for a bot here in Janitor but i didn't found one so i decided to make my own!

This game it's really good... It's good but now i feel hollow. Now i have philosophical thoughts of existence, but apart of that i enjoyed the game.

If someone sees this bot i hope they give the game a chance, it's not that expensive.

¡Viva Lilith! Siempre existiras en mi corazón
creator: MaEsther
